welcome.title: Timesheet
welcome.subtitle: Mobile time tracking for employees
welcome.instructions.title: How it works
welcome.instructions.step1: Enter your name and customer details
welcome.instructions.step3: Sign digitally at the end of the week
welcome.instructions.step5: Done! Your data stays on your device
welcome.privacy.title: Privacy & Data Storage
welcome.privacy.text: All your data is stored exclusively locally on your device. No transmission to external servers takes place. You have full control over your data at all times and can delete it.
welcome.consent: I have read the privacy information and agree to local data storage.
welcome.description: Simple and secure recording of your working hours
timesheet.title: Timesheet
timesheet.confirmNewSheet: Do you want to create a new empty timesheet for another customer?
timesheet.customerEmailHelp: Customer will automatically receive a copy of the timesheet
timesheet.monthEndWarning: {{count}} unsigned week(s) found in this month.
timesheet.monthEndReminderMessage: There are still {{count}} unsigned week(s) in this month. Please review and sign your open timesheets before the end of the month.
timesheet.monthEndReminderHint: You can open the pending weeks directly and complete them.
day.absenceActive: Absence active - working hours will be ignored
day.individuallyEditable: Individual days can be customized even with shift model
day.lockedDifferentMonthTooltip: This day is in a different month. Please create a new timesheet.
day.shiftConfig.title: Configure Shift Times
day.shiftConfig.dayInfo: Times will be applied to Monday through Friday
day.shiftConfig.lateInfo: Times will be applied to late shift days
day.shiftConfig.nightInfo: Times will be applied to night shift days
signature.drawHint: Draw signature with finger or mouse
export.instructions.title: How it works
actions.confirmClearTimes: Do you want to delete all time entries for this week? Name and customer will be preserved.
actions.confirmDeleteAll: Do you really want to delete ALL data irreversibly? This action cannot be undone.
actions.csvExportSuccess: CSV was successfully exported. Would you like to clear the time data for a new week?
actions.deleteAllFinalWarning:
🚨 FINAL WARNING!

Are you absolutely sure?
This action CANNOT be undone!

All data will be permanently deleted.
actions.deleteAllWarning:
⚠️ WARNING: Delete all data?

This will delete ALL stored data:
• All timesheets
• Employee name
• Customer data
• Settings

You will be returned to the start screen.

Do you really want to continue?
actions.pdfExportSuccess: PDF was successfully exported. Would you like to clear the time data for a new week?
actions.shareSuccess: Timesheet was successfully shared. Would you like to clear the time data for a new week?
errors.shareError: Error sharing. PDF will be downloaded instead.
share.title: Timesheet CW
status.weekLocked: ⚠️ This week is locked and cannot be edited anymore.
footer.dataLocal: All data is stored locally only
pwa.email.subject: Timesheet - Mobile App
pwa.email.body: Here is the link to the Timesheet App:
pwa.install.title: Install App
pwa.install.description: Install the app on your device for faster access and offline use.
pwa.ios.step1: Tap the Share icon at the bottom
pwa.ios.step2: Scroll down and select 'Add to Home Screen'
pwa.android.step1: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top right
pwa.android.step2: Select 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen'
pwa.benefits.title: Benefits:
pwa.desktop.title: Open on Mobile Device
pwa.desktop.description: This app is optimized for mobile devices. Scan the QR code with your smartphone.
backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.export.title: Create Backup
backup.export.description: Create a backup copy of all your data for safekeeping.
backup.export.weekData: All week data and time entries
backup.import.title: Restore Backup
backup.import.description: Restore your data from a previously created backup file.
backup.import.warningText: All current data will be replaced by the backup. Create a current backup first.
update.title: Update Available
update.description: A new version of the app is available. Update now for the latest features and improvements.
backupReminder.title: Backup Reminder
backupReminder.description: No backup has been created for more than 7 days. Back up your data regularly to avoid data loss.
app.title: Employee App
settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Full name
settings.editNameInfo: Name can be changed after logout
vacation.title: Vacation Request
vacation.comingSoon: This feature will be available soon

vacation.mustReadTerms: Please confirm that you have read the information.
vacation.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields and sign.

vacation.confirmUnderstood: I understand that this is only a request and not yet approved.
vacation.submitSuccess:
✅ Vacation request has been successfully created and downloaded!

Please submit the PDF to your supervisor.
vacation.submitError: ❌ Error creating vacation request. Please try again.
advancePayment.title: Salary Advance Request
advancePayment.comingSoon: This feature will be available soon
advancePayment.importantInfo: Important: The maximum advance amount per month is 250 euros in total. Advance payments are only granted from the 10th until the end of the month.
advancePayment.expectedReturnPlaceholder: by bank transfer to the known bank account
advancePayment.expectedReturnHelp: The transfer will be made on the next Wednesday after the application.
advancePayment.medicalCertificate: I confirm the accuracy of the information
advancePayment.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
advancePayment.sendSuccess:
✅ Salary advance request has been created!

Please send the opened email.
advancePayment.whatsappSuccess:
✅ WhatsApp has been opened.

Please send the message.
advancePayment.confirmTerms: I have read and understood the information.
advancePayment.successMessage: Your salary advance request has been successfully created.
advancePayment.legalBindingQuestion: Is the information in the list legally binding?
advancePayment.timeAutomatic: The date will be automatically recorded when sent
vacation.legalTerms.point1: Paid or unpaid leave must be requested at least 2 weeks before commencement.
vacation.legalTerms.point2: Written approval from the company and the client company is required before taking leave.
vacation.legalTerms.point3: Unauthorized leave is considered gross misconduct and will result in immediate termination.
vacation.legalTerms.point4: During unpaid leave, both work obligations and salary continuation are suspended.
vacation.legalTerms.point5: Unpaid leave exceeding three weeks terminates the insurance relationship!
vacation.legalTerms.point6: Unpaid leave can only be granted with complete and justified reasoning.
vacation.legalTerms.point7: Medically certified sick leave during vacation does not extend the vacation period.
vacation.preview.title: PDF Preview
vacation.preview.hint: This is a preview. Please verify all information.
advancePayment.legalTerms.title: Important Notes for Employees
advancePayment.legalTerms.point1: The maximum advance amount per month is 250 euros in total
advancePayment.legalTerms.point2: Advance payments are only granted from the 10th until the end of the month
advancePayment.legalTerms.point3: An advance is only granted if all possible timesheets have been submitted
advancePayment.legalTerms.point4: Transfers of approved salary advances are made on the next Wednesday after the application
advancePayment.email.intro: I hereby request a salary advance.
advancePayment.email.returnTbd: by bank transfer to the known bank account
advancePayment.email.certificate: I confirm the accuracy of the information.
advancePayment.timeAutoDisplay: The date will be automatically recorded when sent
